div.style: position:relative; width:800px; height:360px; background:#0a0a0c; border-radius:24px; overflow:hidden; font-family:Inter, system-ui, sans-serif;

position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%, -50%); box-sizing:border-box; width:720px; height:280px; padding:40px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border-radius:32px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:40px; backdrop-filter:blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 4px; border-radius: 36px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), rgba(255,255,255,0.05));

z-index: 0;position: absolute;display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 4px; border-radius: 36px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), rgba(255,255,255,0.05));
font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 1.5px; margin-bottom: 4px; text-decoration: underline;
display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 10px; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 10px; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
